Eternals (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $164,870,264Details
International Box Office $237,194,665
Worldwide Box Office $402,064,929
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,791,141
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,291,110
Total $6,082,251
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Ancient aliens who have been living on Earth in secret for thousands of years. Following the events of Avengers: Endgame, an unexpected tragedy forces them out of the shadows to reunite against mankind’s most ancient enemy, the Deviants.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$71,297,219 (43.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:41.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,090 opening theaters/4,090 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $193,881,658

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 5th, 2021 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: November 3rd, 2021 (Wide), released as 永恆族 (Hong Kong)
November 3rd, 2021 (Wide) (Belgium)
November 3rd, 2021 (Wide) (Austria)
November 3rd, 2021 (Wide) (Finland)
November 3rd, 2021 (Wide) (Denmark)
Video Release: January 11th, 2022 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for fantasy violence and action, some language and brief sexuality.
(Rating bulletin 2699 (cert #53410), 9/22/2021)
Running Time: 156 minutes
Franchise: Marvel Cinematic Universe

Production Countries: United States

Synopsis

Ancient aliens who have been living on Earth in secret for thousands of years. Following the events of Avengers: Endgame, an unexpected tragedy forces them out of the shadows to reunite against mankind’s most ancient enemy, the Deviants.
